steps.title: Discover
steps.body: We learn your goals, users and constraints before writing a line of code.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: We prototype the flows, test them early and agree the direction together.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: One team ships the front and back, so the prototype becomes the product.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We release, measure what matters and iterate on real usage.
